messages.content: Top action movies in Hindi

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Action' AND l.`english_name`='Hindi' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Movies with both action and comedy genres

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg1 ON m.`id`=mg1.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g1 ON mg1.`genre_ids`=g1.`id` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg2 ON m.`id`=mg2.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g2 ON mg2.`genre_ids`=g2.`id` WHERE g1.`name`='Action' AND g2.`name`='Comedy' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
When was Interstellar released
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Interstellar%' LIMIT 1;
Average rating per language

SELECT l.`english_name`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`),2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`language` l JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON l.`iso_639_1`=m.`original_language` GROUP BY l.`english_name` HAVING `movie_count`>=10 ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC;
Action movies released in the last 90 days

SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE g.`name` = 'Action' AND m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Best comedy movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Comedy' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Genres with average popularity above 20

SELECT g.`name`, ROUND(AVG(m.`popularity`), 2) AS `avg_popularity` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` HAVING AVG(m.`popularity`) > 20 ORDER BY `avg_popularity` DESC;
Movies about artificial intelligence
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`overview` LIKE '%artificial intelligence%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Which genres have fewer than 10 movies?
SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` HAVING `movie_count` < 10 ORDER BY `movie_count`;
Oldest movies in the database
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.`release_date` ASC LIMIT 10;
All available languages
SELECT l.`english_name` FROM `repo`.`language` l ORDER BY l.`english_name`;
Movies released in the last 6 months
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 50;
Movies released in January or February
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE MONTH(m.`release_date`) IN (1, 2) ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Best family movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Family' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Count movies released each decade
SELECT CONCAT(FLOOR(YEAR(m.`release_date`)/10)*10, 's') AS `decade`, COUNT(*) AS `count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `decade` ORDER BY `decade`;
Movies about space
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`overview` LIKE '%space%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Find movies similar to Inception

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`overview` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg_ref ON mg.`genre_ids`=mg_ref.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m_ref ON mg_ref.`movie_id`=m_ref.`id` WHERE m_ref.`title` LIKE '%Inception%' AND m.`title` NOT LIKE '%Inception%' GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`overview` ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
List all genres
SELECT g.`name` FROM `repo`.`genre` g ORDER BY g.`name`;
Sci-fi movies with rating above 8

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Science Fiction' AND m.`vote_average`>8 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
What genres does Interstellar belong to?

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Interstellar%' GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title`;
Find all Fast and Furious movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Fast%' AND m.`title` LIKE '%Furious%' ORDER BY m.`release_date` ASC LIMIT 20;
Movies about zombies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`overview` LIKE '%zombie%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Languages with more than 50 movies

SELECT l.`english_name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` GROUP BY l.`english_name` HAVING `movie_count` > 50 ORDER BY `movie_count` DESC;
Best drama movies in Korean

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Drama' AND l.`english_name`='Korean' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Find movies with war in the title
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%war%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Drama movies released in 2020 or later

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Drama' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`)>=2020 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Total number of movies
SELECT COUNT(*) AS `total_movies` FROM `repo`.`movie` m;
Show all genres for The Dark Knight

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Dark Knight%' GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title`;
Movies released in the last 90 days
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 50;
Top rated movies released in the last 3 months
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Movies released between 2010 and 2015
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) BETWEEN 2010 AND 2015 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 30;
Top documentary movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Documentary' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies released in January
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE MONTH(m.`release_date`)=1 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies with fewer than 100 votes
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`vote_count`<100 ORDER BY m.`vote_count` ASC LIMIT 20;
Top fantasy movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Fantasy' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Best horror movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Horror' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies about the ocean
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`overview` LIKE '%ocean%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
List genres for movies released in 2023

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) = 2023 GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title` ORDER BY m.`title`;
Movies released in December
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE MONTH(m.`release_date`)=12 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies with rating between 5 and 6
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`vote_average` BETWEEN 5.0 AND 6.0 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Best English language movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='English' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Best mystery movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Mystery' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top 10 languages by movie count

SELECT l.`english_name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`language` l JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON l.`iso_639_1`=m.`original_language` GROUP BY l.`english_name` ORDER BY `movie_count` DESC LIMIT 10;
Top 10 movies by popularity released after 2018
SELECT m.`title`, m.`popularity`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`)>2018 ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 10;
Total movies per year for the last 10 years
SELECT YEAR(m.`release_date`) AS `year`, COUNT(*) AS `count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`)>=YEAR(CURDATE())-10 GROUP BY YEAR(m.`release_date`) ORDER BY `year` DESC;
Genres where total vote count exceeds 500000

SELECT g.`name`, SUM(m.`vote_count`) AS `total_votes` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` HAVING `total_votes` > 500000 ORDER BY `total_votes` DESC;
Show me all Batman movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Batman%' ORDER BY m.`release_date` ASC LIMIT 20;
Genre distribution in Spanish language movies

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `genre_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Spanish' GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `genre_count` DESC;
Movies with love in the title
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%love%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Most popular genre in Hindi movies

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `genre_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Hindi' GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `genre_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Genres with average rating above 7

SELECT g.`name`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`), 2) AS `avg_rating` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` HAVING AVG(m.`vote_average`) > 7 ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC;
English action movies from the 2000s

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Action' AND l.`english_name`='English' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`) BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
What is the overview of The Godfather
SELECT m.`title`, m.`overview` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Godfather%' LIMIT 1;
How many movies per language
SELECT l.`english_name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`language` l JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON l.`iso_639_1`=m.`original_language` GROUP BY l.`english_name` ORDER BY `movie_count` DESC;
Best animated movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Animation' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies released after 2015
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`)>2015 ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 50;
Movies released in the last 2 weeks
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 20;
New releases in the past year
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 20;
Korean thriller movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Thriller' AND l.`english_name`='Korean' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Movies with fire in the title
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%fire%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top 20 most popular movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies with star in the title

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `genre_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='English' GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `genre_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Top drama movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Drama' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Highest rated movie
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 1;
Languages with at least 20 movies and average rating above 6

SELECT l.`english_name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`), 2) AS `avg_rating` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` GROUP BY l.`english_name` HAVING COUNT(*) >= 20 AND AVG(m.`vote_average`) > 6 ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC;
Movies with dark in the title
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%dark%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Popularity of movies released in 2023
SELECT m.`title`, m.`popularity`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`)=2023 ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 20;
How many movies were released each month in 2022?

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(m.`release_date`, '%M') AS `month_name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) = 2022 AND m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MONTH(m.`release_date`), DATE_FORMAT(m.`release_date`, '%M') ORDER BY MONTH(m.`release_date`);
Movies released this year
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) = YEAR(CURDATE()) ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 50;
Movies with original title different from English title

SELECT m.`title`, m.`original_title`, l.`english_name` AS `original_language` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` WHERE m.`original_title` != m.`title` AND m.`original_title` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Which release years had more than 100 movies?
SELECT YEAR(m.`release_date`) AS `year`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `year` HAVING `movie_count` > 100 ORDER BY `year` DESC;
Top Japanese movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Japanese' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
How many movies are in each genre
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Japanese' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Show movies with release date as Month Year
SELECT m.`title`, DATE_FORMAT(m.`release_date`, '%M %Y') AS `release_month_year` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 20;
Find movies with dragon in the title
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%dragon%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top Korean movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Find the movie Baahubali
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top war movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='War' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
List genres for each movie

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title` ORDER BY m.`title` LIMIT 20;
Best adventure movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Adventure' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Tell me about Inception
SELECT m.`title`, m.`original_title`, m.`overview`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average`, m.`vote_count`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Inception%' LIMIT 1;
Top 3 most common genres overall
SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `genre_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `genre_count` DESC LIMIT 3;
Show genres for all Avengers movies

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Avengers%' GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title` ORDER BY m.`release_date`;
Show genre tags for the 5 most popular movies

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title`, m.`popularity` ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 5;
Best sci-fi movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Science Fiction' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top Hindi action movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Action' AND l.`english_name`='Hindi' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
How many movies are in the database

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Action' AND l.`english_name`='Hindi' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Top 10 most voted movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_count`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m ORDER BY m.`vote_count` DESC LIMIT 10;
Best western movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Western' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Non-adult comedy movies with high ratings

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE g.`name` = 'Comedy' AND m.`adult` = 0 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies with night in the title
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%night%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
List all genres for Parasite

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Parasite%' GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title`;
Non-English movies with rating above 8

SELECT m.`title`, l.`english_name` AS `original_language`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name` != 'English' AND m.`vote_average` > 8 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies similar to Interstellar

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`overview` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg_ref ON mg.`genre_ids`=mg_ref.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m_ref ON mg_ref.`movie_id`=m_ref.`id` WHERE m_ref.`title` LIKE '%Interstellar%' AND m.`title` NOT LIKE '%Interstellar%' GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`overview` ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Lowest rated movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`vote_count` > 100 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` ASC LIMIT 10;
Most common genre in Korean movies

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `genre_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `genre_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Best history movies

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `genre_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `genre_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Movies similar to The Dark Knight

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`overview` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg_ref ON mg.`genre_ids`=mg_ref.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m_ref ON mg_ref.`movie_id`=m_ref.`id` WHERE m_ref.`title` LIKE '%Dark Knight%' AND m.`title` NOT LIKE '%Dark Knight%' GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`overview` ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Most popular genre in French cinema

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `genre_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `genre_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Movies released in December

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `genre_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `genre_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Count of movies per month this year
SELECT MONTH(m.`release_date`) AS `month`, COUNT(*) AS `count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`)=YEAR(CURDATE()) GROUP BY MONTH(m.`release_date`) ORDER BY `month`;
Japanese anime or animation movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Animation' AND l.`english_name`='Japanese' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Movies with title containing love released after 2010

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Animation' AND l.`english_name`='Japanese' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Movies with both drama and romance genres

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg1 ON m.`id`=mg1.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g1 ON mg1.`genre_ids`=g1.`id` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg2 ON m.`id`=mg2.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g2 ON mg2.`genre_ids`=g2.`id` WHERE g1.`name`='Drama' AND g2.`name`='Romance' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Average rating of all movies
SELECT ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`),2) AS `avg_rating` FROM `repo`.`movie` m;
Most popular movie
SELECT m.`title`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 1;
Average rating per genre

SELECT g.`name`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`),2) AS `avg_rating` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC;
Find Dangal
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date`, m.`overview` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Dangal%' OR m.`original_title` LIKE '%Dangal%' LIMIT 5;
Total votes per genre

SELECT g.`name`, SUM(m.`vote_count`) AS `total_votes` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` ORDER BY `total_votes` DESC;
Show me the Godfather
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date`, m.`overview` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Godfather%' ORDER BY m.`release_date` ASC LIMIT 20;
For each genre, list comma-separated movie titles

SELECT g.`name`, GROUP_CONCAT(m.`title` ORDER BY m.`title` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `movie_titles` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name`;
Movies with rating above 7.5
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`vote_average`>7.5 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 30;
Top Tamil movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Telugu' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies with no overview
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`overview` IS NULL OR m.`overview`='' ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 20;
Recommend movies like Parasite
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Tamil' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top genres in Japanese films

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `genre_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Japanese' GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `genre_count` DESC LIMIT 5;
Top romance movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Romance' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top 10 action movies

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `genre_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id`=mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id`=m.`id` JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Japanese' GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `genre_count` DESC LIMIT 5;
Languages with total vote count above 1 million
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Spanish' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
How many movies released each year
SELECT YEAR(m.`release_date`) AS `year`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m GROUP BY YEAR(m.`release_date`) ORDER BY `year` DESC;
Comedy movies in English with rating above 7

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Comedy' AND l.`english_name`='English' AND m.`vote_average`>7 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies with more than 10000 votes
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_count`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`vote_count`>10000 ORDER BY m.`vote_count` DESC LIMIT 20;
Show release dates formatted as DD/MM/YYYY for top 10 rated movies

SELECT m.`title`, DATE_FORMAT(m.`release_date`, '%d/%m/%Y') AS `release_date_formatted`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
How many adult movies are in the database?

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Comedy' AND l.`english_name`='English' AND m.`vote_average`>7 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top crime movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Crime' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
How many movies were released per month-year?
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(m.`release_date`, '%Y-%m') AS `month`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `month` ORDER BY `month` DESC;
All movies released in 2020
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) = 2020 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 50;
Genres where minimum vote average is above 6

SELECT g.`name`, MIN(m.`vote_average`) AS `min_rating` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON g.`id` = mg.`genre_ids` JOIN `repo`.`movie` m ON mg.`movie_id` = m.`id` GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name` HAVING `min_rating` > 6 ORDER BY `min_rating` DESC;
Horror movies released after 2015

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Horror' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`)>2015 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Which month has the most movie releases?
SELECT MONTH(m.`release_date`) AS `month_num`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `month_num` ORDER BY `movie_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Top 5 action movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Action' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 5;
Movies about revenge
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`overview` LIKE '%revenge%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies released in 2019
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`) = 2019 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 50;
Movies with blood in the title
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%blood%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top Hindi movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Hindi' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies about robots
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`overview` LIKE '%robot%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Show only non-adult movies with rating above 8
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`adult` = 0 AND m.`vote_average` > 8 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Best Chinese movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Hindi' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Most popular horror movies released in the last 2 years

SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE g.`name` = 'Horror' AND m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR) ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 10;
Average movie rating by release year

SELECT YEAR(m.`release_date`) AS `year`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`), 2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `year` ORDER BY `year` DESC;
Which genres have more than 200 movies?
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Chinese' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
What is the rating of Parasite
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`vote_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Parasite%' LIMIT 1;
Best French movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top 20 movies with their genres listed

SELECT m.`title`, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT g.`name` ORDER BY g.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `genres` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` GROUP BY m.`id`, m.`title` ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 20;
Find the Avengers movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Avengers%' ORDER BY m.`release_date` ASC LIMIT 20;
Suggest movies like Dangal
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies with man in the title
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%man%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies released in the summer (June, July, August)
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE MONTH(m.`release_date`) IN (6, 7, 8) ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top 5 movies by vote count
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m ORDER BY m.`vote_count` DESC LIMIT 5;
Movies released in the last 30 days
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`release_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY m.`release_date` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies with rating above 8
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`vote_average` > 8 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies about time travel
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`overview` LIKE '%time travel%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Details about the movie Parasite
SELECT m.`title`, m.`original_title`, m.`overview`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average`, m.`vote_count`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE m.`title` LIKE '%Parasite%' LIMIT 1;
Top thriller movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Thriller' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top music movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Music' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Movies released before 2000
SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m WHERE YEAR(m.`release_date`)<2000 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Action movies released after 2010 with rating above 7

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Action' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`)>2010 AND m.`vote_average`>7 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top rated French movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Most popular Korean movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 10;
Best Telugu movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Telugu' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Top 20 Telugu movies by rating
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Telugu' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
Top 5 Telugu movies by popularity
SELECT m.`title`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Telugu' ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 5;
Best Spanish movies
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Spanish' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Top 5 Italian movies by rating
SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Italian' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 5;
Top 3 Italian movies in 2023

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Italian' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`)=2023 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 3;
French movies with the word love in the title

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' AND m.`title` LIKE '%love%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Highest rated French movies with the word love in the title

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' AND m.`title` LIKE '%love%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 5;
Highest rated French movies with the word love in the title, along with their release dates

SELECT m.`title`, m.`release_date`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' AND m.`title` LIKE '%love%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 5;
Korean movies with the word night in the title

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' AND m.`title` LIKE '%night%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
German movies with the word death in the title

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='German' AND m.`title` LIKE '%death%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Highest rated German movies with the word death in the title, with their overviews

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`overview` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='German' AND m.`title` LIKE '%death%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 5;
Top Korean movies from 2018 to 2022

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`) BETWEEN 2018 AND 2022 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Most popular Hindi movies released in January

SELECT m.`title`, m.`popularity` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Hindi' AND MONTH(m.`release_date`)=1 ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 10;
Top French movies from the last 5 years

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' AND m.`release_date`>=DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 YEAR) ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Best French thrillers

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' AND g.`name`='Thriller' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Top Korean drama movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' AND g.`name`='Drama' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Best Tamil action movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='Tamil' AND g.`name`='Action' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Best Tamil thrillers from the last five years

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='Tamil' AND g.`name`='Thriller' AND m.`release_date`>=DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 YEAR) ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Best Korean thrillers from 2018 to 2022

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' AND g.`name`='Thriller' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`) BETWEEN 2018 AND 2022 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
French comedy movies with more than 500 votes

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`vote_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' AND g.`name`='Comedy' AND m.`vote_count`>500 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Top 5 Japanese Animation movies with at least 1000 votes

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`vote_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='Japanese' AND g.`name`='Animation' AND m.`vote_count`>=1000 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 5;
Top Hindi drama movies

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='Hindi' AND g.`name`='Drama' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Compare Telugu and Tamil average ratings

SELECT l.`english_name`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`),2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name` IN ('Telugu','Tamil') GROUP BY l.`english_name` ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC;
Most common genre in English films

SELECT g.`name`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`genre` g JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='English' GROUP BY g.`name` ORDER BY `movie_count` DESC LIMIT 1;
Average rating of French movies vs German movies

SELECT l.`english_name`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`),2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name` IN ('French','German') GROUP BY l.`english_name` ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC;
Most popular Korean movies released in 2020

SELECT m.`title`, m.`popularity`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`)=2020 ORDER BY m.`popularity` DESC LIMIT 10;
Compare Telugu vs Tamil ratings

SELECT l.`english_name`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`),2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name` IN ('Telugu','Tamil') GROUP BY l.`english_name` ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC;
Compare Hindi and Korean average ratings

SELECT l.`english_name`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`),2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name` IN ('Hindi','Korean') GROUP BY l.`english_name` ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC;
Compare French vs Spanish movie ratings

SELECT l.`english_name`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`),2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name` IN ('French','Spanish') GROUP BY l.`english_name` ORDER BY `avg_rating` DESC;
Hindi action movies with more than 1000 votes

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`vote_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='Hindi' AND g.`name`='Action' AND m.`vote_count`>1000 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Korean thriller movies with rating above 7

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='Korean' AND g.`name`='Thriller' AND m.`vote_average`>7 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Telugu comedy movies released after 2015

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name`='Telugu' AND g.`name`='Comedy' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`)>2015 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Movies in either Hindi or Tamil

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name` IN ('Hindi','Tamil') ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 20;
French movies about love

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`overview` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language`=l.`iso_639_1` WHERE l.`english_name`='French' AND m.`overview` LIKE '%love%' ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Best horror movies with at least 500 votes

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`vote_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Horror' AND m.`vote_count`>=500 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Top drama movies released in 2022

SELECT m.`title`, m.`vote_average`, m.`release_date` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id`=mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids`=g.`id` WHERE g.`name`='Drama' AND YEAR(m.`release_date`)=2022 ORDER BY m.`vote_average` DESC LIMIT 10;
Compare Telugu vs Tamil ratings by genre

SELECT g.`name` AS `genre`, l.`english_name` AS `language`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`), 2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name` IN ('Telugu', 'Tamil') GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name`, l.`english_name` ORDER BY g.`name`, l.`english_name`;
Compare Hindi and Korean movie ratings per genre

SELECT g.`name` AS `genre`, l.`english_name` AS `language`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`), 2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name` IN ('Hindi', 'Korean') GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name`, l.`english_name` ORDER BY g.`name`, l.`english_name`;
How do French and Spanish movies compare across genres?

SELECT g.`name` AS `genre`, l.`english_name` AS `language`, ROUND(AVG(m.`vote_average`), 2) AS `avg_rating`, COUNT(*) AS `movie_count` FROM `repo`.`movie` m JOIN `repo`.`language` l ON m.`original_language` = l.`iso_639_1` JOIN `repo`.`movie_genres` mg ON m.`id` = mg.`movie_id` JOIN `repo`.`genre` g ON mg.`genre_ids` = g.`id` WHERE l.`english_name` IN ('French', 'Spanish') GROUP BY g.`id`, g.`name`, l.`english_name` ORDER BY g.`name`, l.`english_name`;
